name: Spatial transcriptomics recipe layer
description: Platform-aware spatial transcriptomics recipes for Visium, Visium HD, Xenium, CosMx, MERFISH, Slide-seq, Stereo-seq, DBiT-seq, GeoMx and emerging imaging assays. Generates reproducible preprocessing, spatial-domain/SVG, deconvolution, rare-cell, communication, multi-omics, histology-to-ST, 3D atlas, readiness-gate, spatial foundation-model and IPF/KRT17 validation skeletons with provenance; it does not run heavy spatial analysis inside the MCP process.
